title: Taproot Key-Path Spends
description: Taproot key-path spends spend a P2TR output by providing a Schnorr signature for the tweaked output key without revealing any committed script path. When all parties can cooperate, this is the most compact and private Taproot spend form because it looks like a simple signature check onchain.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Schnorr/Taproot Workshop
resources.notes: Workshop modules 2.0 and 2.1 show how a segwit v1 output can be spent via the key path with a Schnorr signature.

resources.title: BIP 341: Taproot
resources.notes: Canonical Taproot specification covering witness structure and signature-based spending against the tweaked output key.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Advanced technical reference for Taproot transaction construction, Schnorr signatures, and spending-path privacy tradeoffs.
